paper_overview.study_region: Urban River Reach, Yamuna, Delhi, India
temporal_coverage.sampling_dates: Data collected from March 2021 to February 2022. For ST1, 6085 hourly observations. For ST2, 25,540 observations at 15-min intervals.

site.description: Wazirabad barrage, upstream monitoring station on Yamuna River, Delhi
site.source_quote: The data were collected from two Real-Time Water Quality Monitoring Stations (RTWQMS) of the Delhi Pollution Control Committee (DPCC) upstream of the Wazirabad (ST1) barrage and upstream of the Okhla (ST2) barrage. ...
